description: A professional conference organizer needs to configure intelligent branching logic on the post-event attendee feedback survey 'Annual Tech Summit 2024 — Attendee Feedback'. Log in at http://localhost/index.php/admin with admin/Admin123!. Configure the survey so that the 'Session Feedback' question group only displays if the respondent answered 'Yes' to question ATTENDED_SESSIONS ('Did you attend any breakout sessions?'). Set the 'IMPROVE_COMMENTS' question ('What specific improvements would you suggest?') to only display if the respondent gave an overall satisfaction rating of 6 or below on question OVERALL_RATING. Finally, configure the survey's end redirect URL to 'http://techsummit.example.com/thank-you'.

metadata.instrument_source: Professional conference post-event evaluation (PCMA/MPI best practices)
